vocab.meaning: chi tiền, tiêu tiền (thường là cho một món đồ xứng đáng)
vocab.example: I rarely part with my money for home decor, but I made an exception for a beautiful vintage mirror I saw last month.

vocab.meaning: một thứ gì đó rất đẹp, mãn nhãn
vocab.example: The intricately carved wooden frame of the mirror I bought is a real feast for the eyes.

vocab.meaning: tốn rất nhiều tiền, làm khánh kiệt túi tiền
vocab.example: I wanted a full-length mirror for my bedroom, but I made sure it didn't break the bank.

vocab.word: on the spur of the moment
vocab.meaning: quyết định tức thời, không dự tính trước
vocab.example: I actually bought my vanity mirror on the spur of the moment while I was just browsing a local furniture store.
Occasions where I actually go out specifically to buy a mirror are few and far between.

vocab.meaning: vừa khít, cực kỳ phù hợp (về kích thước hoặc không gian)
vocab.example: The small circular mirror I purchased fits like a glove in the narrow space above my sink.

vocab.meaning: phần bổ sung hoàn hảo, điều may mắn thêm vào
vocab.example: The mirror was already beautiful, but the fact that it was on sale was the icing on the cake.
That antique silver-plated mirror cost a pretty penny, but it was worth every cent for its historical value.

vocab.meaning: tốt nhất, không thua kém ai
vocab.example: The clarity of the high-definition mirror I bought for my studio is second to none.

vocab.word: buy a pig in a poke
vocab.meaning: mua một món đồ mà không xem xét kỹ (mua hớ/mua mù)
vocab.example: When buying mirrors online, you have to be careful not to buy a pig in a poke, as the reflection quality might be poor.
